title: Refactor: Extract service layer from controllers
original_text: Refactored the codebase by extracting business logic from controllers into a dedicated service layer. Created services/ directory with UserService, OrderService, and ProductService. Controllers now delegate to services for business operations. This improves testability and separation of concerns. Added unit tests for all service classes. Updated dependency injection to use services. Result: 58 tests pass.
expected_subject: refactor(arch): extract service layer from controllers
expected_body_lines: - Create services/ directory with UserService, OrderService, ProductService
- Delegate business logic from controllers to services
- Improve testability and separation of concerns
- Add unit tests for all service classes
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(arch): extract service layer from controllers"
